blocks.text: Working session held at the {{fact:f:E-2019-001.client}} offices to review interim findings on production flow and agree on the data still outstanding. Minutes prepared by Lisa Hernandez.

items: Jenna Wiley, Principal Consultant, Pinebrook Advisory Group
Lisa Hernandez, Analyst, Pinebrook Advisory Group

blocks.text: Discussion. Jenna walked through the downtime analysis to date: changeovers cluster on two lines and the scheduling pattern, not the equipment, appears to drive most of the variance. Mr. Andersen confirmed the maintenance log extract is complete and asked that the purchasing review include the freight surcharges added by two suppliers this year. Lisa noted that three weeks of order-to-cash timing data are still to confirm with the billing clerk.
Decisions. The team will prioritize the scheduling analysis ahead of the inventory work, and interim findings will go to Mr. Andersen before the next steering session rather than after.

rows: Complete order-to-cash timing pulls with billing clerk
Add supplier freight surcharges to purchasing review
